roadmap.feature_description: Move currentFloor/totalFloors label to row 2 right panel; replace FloorGenerator with FloorDefinition + FloorRegistry handcrafted map system; migrate floor 1 as character grid.

steps.name: FloorDefinition, FloorDefinitionParser, FloorRegistry — floor 1 character grid
criteria: AC1: FloorRegistry.floor(1, config: .default) returns a FloorMap with grid.width == 15 and grid.height == 7
AC2: FloorRegistry.floor(1) entry position == Position(x:7, y:0)
AC5: Every cell on floor 1 has identical passability between FloorRegistry and FloorGenerator (migration gate WS-06)
AC6: FloorRegistry.floor(1) landmark flags (hasEggRoom, hasBossEncounter, hasExitSquare) match FloorGenerator output exactly
AC7: FloorRegistry.floor(99, config: .default) returns a non-nil navigable FloorMap (fallback)
steps.scenario_name: Every cell on floor 1 has the same passability whether served by FloorRegistry or FloorGenerator
quality_gates: HandcraftedMapsWalkingSkeletonTests WS-01 through WS-07 all pass
All existing tests still pass (FloorGenerator untouched)
steps.implementation_notes: Create FloorDefinition.swift (public struct, grid: String, Sendable) and FloorRegistry.swift (public enum with static floor(_:config:) -> FloorMap). FloorDefinitionParser may live in FloorRegistry.swift as an internal type. CRITICAL: Derive the floor 1 character grid from FloorGenerator source, not from data-models.md (which has a transcription error). FloorGenerator positions: entry (7,0), staircase (7,6), encounter/guard (7,2), branch at y=3 x=2..7. The correct grid (north=top): line 0 = y=6 = staircase, line 3 = y=3 = branch (##......#######), line 4 = y=2 = guard (######G########), line 6 = y=0 = entry (######^########). WS-06 is the migration gate: cell-for-cell passability comparison with FloorGenerator. Floors 2-5 can be minimal placeholder stubs (e.g. single-corridor 3x3 grid) that compile — developer will replace them.
deliverables: Sources/GameDomain/FloorRegistry.swift — new public enum with floor 1 grid + placeholders for floors 2-5

steps.name: Replace FloorGenerator with FloorRegistry at 3 RulesEngine + 1 Renderer call sites
criteria: AC1: Ember moves north from entry cell on floor 1 via RulesEngine (which now calls FloorRegistry)
AC2: Ember is blocked by wall when moving west from main corridor on floor 1
AC3: Ember can move along the branch corridor on floor 1 (y=3 branch passable)
AC4: Ember is blocked at south wall and cannot move further south
steps.scenario_name: Ember moves north from the entry cell on floor 1 into the corridor
quality_gates: All existing gameplay and floor navigation tests still pass
FloorGenerator is NOT deleted or modified
steps.implementation_notes: Replace FloorGenerator.generate(floorNumber:config:) with FloorRegistry.floor(_:config:) at: RulesEngine.applyMove line ~173, RulesEngine.applyMove line ~184, RulesEngine.applySpecial line ~278, Renderer.renderDungeon (the single FloorGenerator call there). Do NOT yet change the floor label position or minimap row — that is step 03-01. Only substitute the call site. All 4 substitutions are one-line changes each.

steps.name: Floor label row 2 cols 61-79; minimap row 3; legend rows 10-16; update existing row assertions
criteria: AC1: Renderer writes floor label (e.g. '1/5') to row 2 within cols 61-79 in dungeon mode
AC2: Minimap first write is at row 3 (not row 2) in dungeon mode
AC3: Legend entries appear at rows 10-16 (not rows 9-15)
AC4: Floor label is absent from row 2 in combat, death, win, and start screen modes
AC5: No minimap write at row 2 in the right panel (row 2 is label-only)
steps.scenario_name: Floor label appears in the right panel on row 2 when Ember is exploring a dungeon
quality_gates: Existing MinimapTests and MinimapLegendTests updated and green
steps.implementation_notes: In Renderer.renderDungeon(): (1) Replace old floor label write (row 2, col 80-label.count) with write at row 2, col 61: 'output.moveCursor(row: 2, col: 61); output.write(" \(state.currentFloor)/\(state.config.maxFloors)")'. (2) Update renderMinimap() start row from 2 to 3: screenRow formula changes from '2 + (floor.grid.height - 1 - y)' to '3 + (floor.grid.height - 1 - y)'. (3) Update drawMinimapLegend() to write at rows 10-16 instead of rows 9-15 (add 1 to each row number). drawChrome() is NOT modified. Then update test helpers: MinimapTests.swift uses screenRow formula '2 + (6-y)' → update to '3 + (6-y)'. MinimapLegendTests.swift asserts rows 9-15 → update to rows 10-16.
deliverables: Sources/App/Renderer.swift — label at row 2 cols 61-79; minimap row 3; legend rows 10-16
